basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Anganwadi Worker and Helper Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi (JK Anganwadi) Recruitment 2026: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi has released the official notification for 14 Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 to Graduation Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation or 8th standard

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jkicds.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JK Anganwadi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 to Graduation Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation or 8th standard

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.jkicds.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 22nd July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 14 vacancies are available for the posts of Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) in the Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are distributed between the two posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers)?
faq.answer: For the post of Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers), candidates must have completed 10+2 or Graduation. This means a minimum of a higher secondary education is required, with graduation being an additional preferred qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum age limit for JK Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts under the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 18 years. Candidates must have attained the age of 18 years as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for JK Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 37 years. Candidates should not have crossed this age limit as of the specified date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. Both General/OBC and SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 will primarily involve the preparation of a Merit List based on the qualifications and other criteria. This will be followed by Document Verification for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, and submit it along with the required documents via post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the JK Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The job type for the Sanginis and Sahayikas posts in the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is contractual. This means the positions are offered on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It is also usually available on the official website of Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi.
